questionHtml:
The orange colour disappears when bromine water is added to compound X in the dark.

Which compound is X?


A.  Ethene

B.  Ethane

C.  Ethanol

D.  Ethanoic acid

meta.title: The orange colour disappears when bromine water is added to compound X in the dark. Which compound is X? A. Ethene B. Ethane C. Ethanol D. Ethanoic acid
